Pharmacy accounts

Pharmacy accounting software for supplier bills and daily accounts capture.

Pharmacy businesses handle frequent purchase bills, sales, returns, expenses and bank entries. Fastbooks focuses on faster accounts capture and review.

Core workflow

What Fastbooks helps prepare.

Supplier bill capture

Capture medicine supplier bills and related GST clues for review.

Daily expenses

Prepare recurring shop expense entries without opening a full accounting screen.

Bank and payment entries

Use bank transaction text to prepare payments and receipts for accountant approval.
